title: Dankko Verrimuch
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Dankko.jpg]] |name=Dankko Verrimuch |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Anx/Legends|Anx]][[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]] |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|And Dankko Verrimuch!''"
«''Why, you're welcome, Fode!''»|quoteend=0|Fodesinbeed Annodue pokes fun at Verrimuch's name|}} '''Dankko Verrimuch''' was an [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who competed in the final race of the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Emissaries and Assassins]]'' establishes that the events of [[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]] take place approximately 32 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which corresponds to around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Verrimuch's presence at the Classic's starting point in Malastare's [[Methane/Legends|methane]] wastes was recorded by [[Cam droid/Legends|cam droids]] and announced by race commentator [[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]], who labeled the group as experienced professionals and mocked the Anx's name for its similarity to the phrase "thank you very much." A [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned Anx, Verrimuch wore green [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]] with blue lenses, a purple [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]], and a gold-colored [[Necklace/Legends|necklace]] during the Vinta Harvest Classic's deciding race. ==Behind the scenes== Dankko Verrimuch appeared in the [[Star Wars (1998) 15|fifteenth issue]] of [[Dark Horse Comics]]' [[Star Wars: Republic|''Star Wars'' series]], written by [[Timothy Truman]], penciled by [[Tom Lyle]], and published on [[February 23]], [[2000]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53910/star_wars_1998_15|text=Star Wars (1998) #15}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dankko Verrimuch |nl=Dankko Verrimuch |pl=Dankko Verrimuch}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Verrimuch, Dankko}} [[Category:Anx]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Podracer pilots]]
